options.a: The part of a METAR message that is called supplementary information.
options.b: A message issued by a meteorological office concerning the meteorological conditions which could adversely affect aircraft on the ground, including parked aircraft, and the aerodrome facilities and services.
options.c: A message prepared by a meteorological office concerning wind shear which could adversely affect aircraft on the approach or take-off path, or during a circling approach, between the runway level and a specified upper level, and aircraft on the runway during the landing roll or take-off run.
options.d: A message issued by a meteorological watch office concerning the occurrence and/or expected occurrence of specified en-route weather phenomena, which may affect the safety of aircraft operations.
